prestazioni: Engine: Suzuki Hayabusa-sourced **1300cc K8 (2008+) engine code** with **Toda Racing forged pistons (8.5:1 CR)**, **Tomei 272° cams (Type-R spec)**, and **Jun 3-layer head gasket** for high-boost reliability. Forced induction via **Garrett GT2860RS turbo (0.63 A/R, 62 trim)** on a **custom Westfield/Spyder Motorsport tubular manifold**, paired with a **GReddy Type-S intercooler (front-mount, 12-row core)** and **HKS SSQV4 blow-off valve**.

Drivetrain: **Quaife ATB differential (82A cage)** in a **Westfield 6-speed sequential gearbox (dog-ring conversion)** with **PPG straight-cut gears (1st-4th)** and **AP Racing twin-plate clutch (240mm, cerametallic friction)**. Custom **3.9:1 final drive ratio** for optimal acceleration.

Suspension/Chassis: **Öhlins TTX25 MkII coilovers (2-way adjustable, 400lb/in springs front, 350lb/in rear)** with **polyurethane Westfield bushings (SuperPro 620R)**. **AP Racing 4-pot calipers (CP5200, 280mm discs front, 240mm rear)** with **Ferodo DS2500 pads** and **Goodridge 3AN braided lines**. **Custom tubular subframe reinforcement (T45 steel, 2mm wall thickness)** and **Whiteline adjustable rear toe arms (WTA1000)** for precision alignment.
estetica: Aero: **Westfield XTR2 widebody kit (carbon fiber, 100mm extended arches front/rear)** with **custom 3D-printed ABS splitter (25mm overhang, 3° angle of attack)** and **Rear diffuser by Carbonology Sport (3-channel, 15% downforce increase at 100mph)**. **Custom aluminum side skirts (2mm thick, CNC-machined)** with integrated **AeroCatch DTM-style door latches**.

Exterior: **Full **PPG **'Lime Squeeze' (custom mixed, 3-stage pearl)** paint with **vinyl-wrapped carbon fiber bonnet (VIS Racing, pre-preg 2x2 twill)** and **clear bra (XPEL Ultimate, full front clip)**. **Hella Rallye 3000 (7-inch, 100W H3 bulbs)** in **custom CNC-machined aluminum buckets (anodized gold)** with **carbon fiber beam covers (Seibon)**. **Custom aluminum fuel filler cap (CNC-machined, engraved 'Megabusa K8')** replacing the OEM unit.

Interior: **Sparco Pro 2000 seats (carbon fiber shell, FIA 8855-1999 certified)** with **Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses (ASM homologation)**. **Custom aluminum dashboard (CNC-machined, 3mm thick)** housing **AIM MXS 1.2 Strada dash (12,000 RPM redline, oil temp/pressure sensors)** and **Motec PDM15 power distribution module**. **Carbon fiber door cards (VIS Racing, 1.5mm thick)** with **aluminum door pulls (anodized black)** and **LED shift lights (AEM X-Series, 12-segment)** mounted on the A-pillar.
